p.s. i hope my request will satisfy everyone, including the bot's requester. i just thought it would be better to describe a college student without linking a specific specialty. it is enough to enter your specialization (major) in college into your persona, the bot will know what major you have. i just don't want to burden the space with bots with each individual specialization of the user's education, otherwise there will be a thousand bots, which is inconvenient
